paper.title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills

blocks.snippet: SkillOpt is ... the first systematic controllable text-space optimizer for agent skills... bounded add/delete/replace edits... held-out validation score.
blocks.note: 将 skill 文档作为冻结 agent 的外部可训练状态。

blocks.snippet: Agent skills provide a natural interface ... a portable natural-language artifact that packages procedures, domain heuristics, tool policies, output constraints, and failure modes.
blocks.note: skill 是程序性适配层，而不只是 prompt。

blocks.snippet: SkillOpt repeatedly samples trajectory batches, analyzes successes and failures, and asks a frontier optimizer model to propose structured add/delete/replace edits.
blocks.note: 核心循环：rollout -> reflection -> bounded edit -> validation gate。

blocks.snippet: Given train, selection, and test splits ... selects the best skill on D_sel, and reports final performance on D_test.
blocks.note: 训练、选择、测试三分，避免把验证成功误报为泛化。

blocks.snippet: At each optimization step, the target model runs a rollout batch from D_tr with the current skill... This batch is the evidence unit.
blocks.note: rollout batch 是文本空间优化的证据单元。

blocks.snippet: Failure minibatches propose missing or corrective rules; success minibatches preserve behaviors that already work.
blocks.note: 失败给纠错规则，成功给保留规则。

blocks.snippet: The learning-rate analogue in SkillOpt is the edit budget L_t... Unbounded rewrites can erase useful rules...
blocks.note: 文本学习率就是每步允许的编辑数。

blocks.snippet: Every candidate skill is evaluated on D_sel... If it improves ... accepted; otherwise rejected.
blocks.note: 验证门把自反思变成 propose-and-test，而非无条件改写。

blocks.snippet: The optimizer model writes a concise longitudinal guidance block into a protected slow-update field... The meta skill is optimizer-side only.
blocks.note: 慢更新沉淀跨 epoch 经验，meta skill 不部署。

blocks.snippet: six benchmarks... seven target models... three execution modes (direct chat, Codex harness, Claude Code harness).
blocks.note: 实验覆盖 QA、表格、文档、多模态、数学、ALFWorld 和三类 harness。

blocks.snippet: SkillOpt wins or matches the best measured result on 52 of 52 evaluated cells.
blocks.note: 主结果：52/52 最优或并列最优。

blocks.snippet: On GPT-5.5 direct chat... rises from 58.8 (no skill) to 82.3 (SkillOpt), a +23.5 point absolute improvement.
removing the rejected-edit buffer lowers scores... removing both meta skill and slow update drops SpreadsheetBench from 77.5 to 55.0.
blocks.note: 负反馈和慢/元更新是稳定器。

blocks.snippet: All four cross-model rows are positive... harness-shift rows ... SpreadsheetBench Codex to Claude Code +59.7.
blocks.note: skill artifact 有跨模型、跨 harness 可迁移性。

blocks.snippet: final best_skill.md ranges from 379 tokens to 1,995 tokens... edits ... between 1 and 4.
blocks.note: 部署产物很小，接受编辑数很少。
